hook_scenes.title: The Smoke-Filled Room
hook_scenes.narration_preview: In the winter of 1924, a group of powerful industrialists quietly gathered in a smoke-filled room in Geneva...

hook_scenes.title: The Centennial Anomaly
hook_scenes.narration_preview: Hanging in a fire station in Livermore, California, is a bulb that has been burning since 1901...

full_narration: In the winter of 1924, far from the public eye, a group of powerful industrialists quietly gathered in a smoke-filled room in Geneva, Switzerland. Representing the world's leading lighting conglomerates, these men were not there to celebrate innovation. They were planning a conspiracy that would secretly restrict global progress. Their objective was simple yet sinister: to intentionally design a lightbulb that would fail sooner, forcing consumers to buy more. It was the birth of planned obsolescence — a calculated sabotage of human engineering. And for decades, they got away with it completely. Here's the proof they tried to erase. Hanging in a fire station in Livermore, California, is a small bulb that has been burning continuously since 1901. Over a century. It proves we had the technology to make lightbulbs last forever. And the industry deliberately chose to destroy it.
notes: Trim at ~55s. Adjust -t in ffmpeg if actual voiceover runs longer. Add full video link in description before uploading.
